headline: 3 Electronics Stocks Set to Benefit From a Thriving Industry
summary: Electronics stocks like KLAC, TER and GRMN are expected to benefit from investments in infrastructure and expanded capacity despite macroeconomic headwinds.

headline: Garmin Sonar Launch Targets Tournament Anglers And Marine Growth Potential
summary: Garmin (NYSE:GRMN) has introduced a 360 degree scanning sonar system paired with its Spy Pole for anglers. The system delivers real-time 2D and 3D underwater views with independent motorized control of the pole. The public debut is scheduled for the Bassmaster Classic, a high profile fishing tournament and industry event. For Garmin, better known to many investors for fitness wearables and automotive navigation, marine electronics is an important part of the wider business. The new 360...

headline: Is Garmin Stock Underperforming the Nasdaq?
summary: While Garmin has not kept pace with the Nasdaq Composite over the past year, its recent gains have been stronger, and analysts remain moderately upbeat on the stock’s future.
